suite.name: Shopping Cart Flow

test.name: Registered User Can Add Item To Basket

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/khadirzavareh/Fruit-Juice-Automation/e2e_ui_tests/browser/traces/temp/7795a89c-e500-4cc3-8399-b7a3d04ce85a"}

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button[routerlink="/basket"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Apple Juice' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Types the given key combination into element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Apple Juice (1000ml) at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[aria-label="Add to Basket"] >> nth=0'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Placed Apple Juice (1000ml) into basket. at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=mat-cell >> text=Apple Juice (1000ml) at state visible

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Registers a dynamic user, searches for a product, adds it, and verifies cart.

suite.doc: E2E Golden Path: Searching and Adding Items to the Shopping Cart.
